query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cc_config (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  chave VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  valor TEXT,
  createdAt BIGINT DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000),
  updatedAt BIGINT DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000) ON UPDATE (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000)
);
